channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Porsche's €3.9bn writedown cuts automotive profit by 98% in EV retreat - Euronews.com
item.description:
1. Porsche's €3.9bn writedown cuts automotive profit by 98% in EV retreat  Euronews.com
  2. Porsche explores new premium models to drive turnaround  Financial Times
  3. Calling 911: Porsche CEO looks to petrol classics for margin revival  Reuters
  4. Porsche targets high-margin products in strategic reset after 2025 tailspin  Automotive News
  5. Porsche Pivots to Cost-Cutting as Sales Come Under Pressure  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Iran war cost will be passed to consumers, shipping giant boss tells BBC - BBC
item.description:
1. Iran war cost will be passed to consumers, shipping giant boss tells BBC  BBC

  4. Maersk Has 10 Ships Trapped in Gulf, Running Short of Fuel in Asia  WSJ
  5. Maersk updates emergency contingency surcharge for shipments to Middle East  Container News

item.title: Return to the 2022 stock-market playbook as Iran conflict drags on, say these strategists - MarketWatch
item.description:

item.title: Trump’s divisive FDA vaccine regulator self-destructs, will exit agency (again) - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Trump’s divisive FDA vaccine regulator self-destructs, will exit agency (again)  Ars Technica
  2. FDA vaccine head will step down in April after string of controversial decisions  CNBC
  3. Vinay Prasad, key Makary ally and a focus of controversy at the FDA, is leaving the agency  statnews.com
  4. Biotech Stocks Rally on Departure of Polarizing FDA Official  WSJ
  5. Prasad out at FDA after a number of public fights with drugmakers  CIDRAP
